MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff James F. Blanding, is present.
Plaintiff is in Pro Per.
Defendant, Helen Lean Walton, is present.
Attorney,Jenica Mariani, representing the defendant through limited scope.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in room 207.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-25-2010 is vacated.
